# doit_custom_theme (Data Source)

Retrieve a custom color theme by its ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "doit_custom_theme" "example" {
  id = "theme-abc123"
}

output "theme_name" {
  value = data.doit_custom_theme.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Custom theme ID

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `colors` (Attributes) Palettes for light and dark display modes. Each palette must contain between 1 and 32 hex colors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--colors))
- `create_time` (String) The creation time of the custom theme.
- `name` (String) The display name of the custom theme.
- `primary_color` (String) A color in hex notation. Accepts `#RGB`, `#RRGGBB`, or `#RRGGBBAA`.
- `update_time` (String) The time when the custom theme was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--colors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `colors`

Read-Only:

- `dark` (List of String) Colors used when the report is displayed in dark mode.
- `light` (List of String) Colors used when the report is displayed in light mode.
